company.raw_notes: The domain natanitsolutions.com resolves to a brand-new, unconfigured WordPress installation. The homepage contains only the default WordPress 'Hello World' post and filler Lorem Ipsum text — zero real business content. The company name 'Natan IT Solutions' suggests it intends to operate in the IT services space (consistent with the name pattern), but this is inference only, not sourced from the site. Web searches for 'natanitsolutions.com' and 'Natan IT Solutions' returned no matching entity — all results were unrelated companies (NAT IT Solutions, NAN IT Solutions, Nahum Natan Technology Solutions, etc.). None of these can be attributed to this signup.

This could indicate an HR manager, HR director, or someone handling HR functions at the company — but this is inferred from the email prefix only, not confirmed by any source. No individual named 'Natan' associated with this company was found via web search. The first name 'Natan' may or may not be the same as the company name root; it is the name provided at signup.
